title: Differences between versions of Death
wikitext:
[]: Differences between versions of "Death"             Quote Post by chaosakita » Sat Sep 21, 2013 11:55 pm I saw here that there have been multiple versions of Death, namely that in the original there were two songs not present in later releases. I just checked on a random stream and I saw that they were indeed not present. Can anyone expand on what was changed from the original release?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Sep 22, 2013 12:06 am The biggest change is that they pulled most of the extra scenes that were later fit into the DC episodes out of Death.

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Sun Sep 22, 2013 1:54 am NemZ wrote: The biggest change is that they pulled most of the extra scenes that were later fit into the DC episodes out of Death.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Sep 30, 2013 10:41 pm chaosakita wrote: I wonder what happened to "Kyomou e no, izon" though.

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Wed Oct 02, 2013 4:35 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: From what I understand, the extended mindrape sequence wasn't in Death, or only part of it was?

I just checked on a random stream and I saw that they were indeed not present. Can anyone expand on what was changed from the original release?
